who: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms managing 5-15 employees
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5-15 employees, manual tracking causes missed training deadlines. We automate tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Tracking employee training and certification deadlines
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Indie Hackers discussions on workflow solutions
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing employee data
